programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: We Three Kings
programme.desc: A retired musician hatches a plan to bring his three daughters home for Christmas for the first time since their mother's death. Holiday songs and old memories soon make the estranged siblings realize that life is better when they're all together.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie makes a difficult decision after Sully lets his temper get the best of him.

programme.title: Selena + Chef

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When someone murders Capt. Frederick Burns, Aurora Teagarden must solve the case, despite never seeing eye to eye with the man.

programme.title: Anatomy of a Fall
programme.desc: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

programme.title: Whistle
programme.desc: Terror strikes when a group of misfit high-school students discovers an ancient death whistle.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: As questions of authenticity, control, and feminism arise in the '90s, Sheryl Crow, Missy Elliott, Courtney Love, Tori Amos, and Alanis Morissette make music on their own terms.

programme.title: Deadly Deed: A Fixer Upper Mystery
